issues.comment: getSubGroupsCount() returns null when the underlying model is not found, violating the GroupModel interface contract which states "Never returns null". Callers like GroupUtils.populateSubGroupCount pass the result directly to representation.setSubGroupCount(group.getSubGroupsCount()), and downstream consumers may auto-unbox the Long to long, causing a NullPointerException. The fix should return 0L (or another non-null default) instead of null to honor the contract.

The reader thread is started but never join()ed before the assertion. Race condition: (1) Reader thread checks deletedAll → false, begins HTTP request. (2) Main thread finishes all deletions, sets deletedAll = true. (3) Main thread runs assertThat → passes (no exceptions yet). (4) Reader thread's in-flight HTTP request fails, adds exception to caughtExceptions — too late, assertion already passed. This means the test can give false positives, passing even when the concurrent read threw an exception. The thread should be joined (with a timeout) before the assertion.
